title: Figma launches new animation tools, code layers, and AI features in its 2026 update
summary: The design platform introduced Motion, Code Layers, and other AI-powered features during the Config conference.

title: OpenAI introduces its first custom chip 'Jalapeño' manufactured by Broadcom
summary: The GPU for language model inference was designed in collaboration with Broadcom and aims to optimize performance and cost.

title: New details of GTA VI: pre-sale, PS5 performance, screenshots, and early access scams
summary: Various reports anticipate the graphics modes, the refusal of two stores to sell it without a disc, and the circulation of fraudulent websites.

title: Microsoft admits that 8 GB of RAM is sufficient for Windows 11 and relaunches its Surface with that configuration
summary: After years of recommending 16 GB, the company reverses course and launches new Surface models with 8 GB of RAM at higher prices.

title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire title due to drop in SpaceX and Tesla stocks
summary: The net worth of the CEO of Tesla and SpaceX suffers a setback after the stock market crash of his companies.

title: A24 enrages its followers by closing a $75 million deal with Google to train AI
summary: The independent film studio signed an agreement that allows Google to use its catalog, which generated criticism from fans and the press.

title: Tech companies struggle to control excessive spending on generative AI
summary: An Accenture report reveals that employees use AI tokens for trivial tasks like converting PDFs into presentations.

title: LastPass suffers another data breach through a supply chain attack on Klue
summary: The popular password manager exposes customer data in a new security incident that affects its reputation.

title: Slate modifies the battery of its low-cost electric pickup truck and announces a price of $24,950
summary: The startup adjusted the design of its vehicle to lower costs and improve range.

title: Millionaires are massively emigrating from their countries due to fiscal and political factors
summary: Studies indicate that Singapore, Italy, Switzerland, Greece, and Hong Kong are the favorite destinations of the wealthy.

title: New cooling designs drastically reduce water consumption in data centers
summary: Technologies like Nvidia's liquid cooling and systems at 45°C promise nearly zero water usage.

title: Qualcomm acquires chip startup Modular for nearly $4 billion
summary: The US company strengthens its processor portfolio with the purchase of the young company.

title: Mistral launches its new OCR 4 model with multilingual document extraction
summary: The AI surpasses competitors in 72% of test cases and improves performance on structured documents.

title: Anthropic integrates its Claude assistant into Slack through the Claude Tag feature
summary: The tool automates tasks and workflows, reportedly writing 65% of internal code according to the company.

title: The White House app automatically downloads on official phones and cannot be removed
summary: Workers report that the 'app' injects government propaganda without the possibility of uninstallation.

title: AI has not destroyed engineering jobs, but software engineers face an identity crisis
summary: Recent data shows that engineering positions are resilient to automation, while a survey reveals discouragement in the sector.

title: Europe hardens its stance against US big tech amid chip war
summary: More and more Europeans avoid services that share data with the US, while the EU challenges Washington's restrictions.

title: China advances in humanoid robots and worries its own AI experts
summary: Morgan Stanley doubles its forecasts for shipments of Chinese robots, while researchers in the country express concern about AI development.

title: Wikipedia workers in the UK seek union recognition for the first time in the world
summary: The foundation's employees start a process to form a union, marking a global milestone in the organization.

title: Pentagon AI system manages to infiltrate secret government networks during a test
summary: The military experiment demonstrated the ability of artificial intelligence to breach classified systems, according to official sources.
